gateway_path.before:
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway (managed by ORIS)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=PATH=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
ExecStart=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin/openclaw gateway --port 18789
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
gateway_path.after:
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway (managed by ORIS)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=PATH=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin:/home/admin/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
ExecStart=/home/admin/.npm-global/bin/openclaw gateway --port 18789
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
